changelog.changes: * Various bugfixes (anonymous mode crash, clear cache crash, broken mouse etc...)

* Contextual menu on long press
* Direct navigation mode (activated by new contextual menu)
* Cursor speed, algorithmic darkening, ad-block list and remote debugging is now configurable
* All dependencies updated 
* Target latest android versions
* Dropped Android 7.x support (only GeckoView-containing build)
* Improvement of the Polish translation (thanks to @ChuckMichael)
* Various bugfixes (thanks to @usman.hafeez for one)
* v2.1.1-2.1.4 Stabilization (thanks to @V1v1X for testing/reporting about bugs)

* Various bugfixes and update for GeckoView engine
* Localization updates
* It was decided to leave support for WebView engine and recommend it for weaker devices

* Engine changing: GeckoView implementation added
* Home page design updated
* Startpage added to default search engines list (thanks to felfert)

* Popup blocking re-implemented (thank you WIStudent for implementation ideas and MR)
* More options and fix for link context menu (thank you MailYouLater for string-case fix)
* Several other small bugs fixed
* Translations updated
